title: Compliance with Deficiencies. In case of non-compliance, the LMA shall
content: 14 comply with the deficiencies or findings in accordance with the Inspection Manual to be 15 issued by the Department. 16 17 The agency shall comply with the deficiencies or findings in accordance with the following: 18 19 a. In case of deficiencies on office facilities, equipment, postings and signages, the 20 LMA shall, within five (5) working days from the date of assessment, correct the 21 deficiencies and submit proof of compliance for verification. Failure to comply 22 shall cause the imposition of suspension of documentary processing, until 23 compliance. 24 25 b. For failure to maintain the required minimum office space, the LMA shall submit 26 proof of compliance within thirty (30) working days from assessment. Failure to 27 comply shall cause the imposition of suspension of documentary processing, 28 until compliance. 29 30 c. In case the audited financial statement indicates an amount lower than the 31 required capitalization, the LMA shall, within thirty (30) working days from the 32 date of assessment, infuse additional capital up to the required minimum level 33 and submit the certificate of corporate filing/information on the present paid-up 34 capital issued by the SEC, or infusion through cash advances from the 35 shareholders. Failure to comply shall cause the suspension of license, until 36 compliance. 37 38 d. In case of non-presentation of the books of accounts and official receipts during 39 assessment, the LMA shall be given ten (10) working days to present such books 40 and receipts; otherwise, a suspension of documentary processing shall be 41 imposed. 42 43 e. If an unauthorized personnel is present in the agency’s premises, the Inspector 44 shall report such findings for review and endorsement to the Department’s 45 Adjudication Office for administrative proceedings. 46 47 C. SALVO/SPOT INSPECTION 48 49
